prompt: A photorealistic beach portrait of a young woman with long copper-red hair, fair skin and freckles, standing at the shoreline with ocean waves and rocks behind her. She wears a red hibiscus flower tucked behind one ear, a white eyelet halter-style beach top, a red wrap mini skirt with ruffle details, and a small silver sequin shoulder bag. Golden-hour sunlight, natural pose with both arms raised adjusting her hair, soft sea breeze, realistic skin texture, shallow depth of field, high-resolution editorial summer fashion photography.
